name: OpenCalc v0.0.9 — Testing Version (Web) 🧪
body:
# OpenCalc v0.0.9 — Testing Version (Web) 🧪 > **This is a pre-release for testing.** The stable v1.0.0 with the first Android APK drops **tomorrow — July 1, 2026**. 🎉 --- ## 📦 What's in this release This is the **web testing build** of OpenCalc. It's the same code that runs on the live preview, packaged as a ZIP so you can download it, run it locally, and help us find bugs before tomorrow's v1.0.0 APK release. ### Download | File | Size | Description | |------|------|-------------| | `opencalc-v0.0.9.zip` | ~232 KB | Full source code (116 files) | | `opencalc-v0.0.9.zip.sha256` | 65 B | SHA256 checksum for integrity | ### Run it locally ```bash # Unzip unzip opencalc-v0.0.9.zip cd opencalc-v0.0.9 # Install dependencies (Bun recommended — faster) bun install # or: npm install # Start the dev server bun run dev # or: npm run dev # Open http://localhost:3000 ``` --- ## ✅ What works in v0.0.9 - 🧮 **Normal calculator** — full arithmetic, memory (MC/MR/M+/M−), undo/redo, percent, power - 🔬 **Scientific calculator** — sin/cos/tan/cot/sec/csc + inverses, ln/log/exp, x²/x³/xʸ/√/∛/ʸ√x/1/x/n!, fraction templates (a/b and compound a/b/c), caret navigation, DEG/RAD toggle, nPr/nCr/rand/floor - 🔄 **Unit converter** — 108 units across 13 categories (length, mass, temperature, area, volume, time, speed, digital storage, energy, power, pressure, angle, frequency) with searchable picker and swap button - 📜 **Persistent history** — searchable, favorite-able, copy & share-able, stored in localStorage - 🧠 **Step-by-step solver** — press `=` then **Steps** to see expression → simplify → rational form → evaluate, with explanations - 🌈 **Live LaTeX rendering** — KaTeX typesetting with incomplete-expression support (fraction template shows `□/□` until filled) - 🌓 **Light/Dark themes** — follows system preference, manually toggleable - 📱 **Orientation lock** — Auto / Portrait / Landscape with auto mode-switching - 🔢 **Decimal places** — Auto (trim zeros) or fixed 2/4/6/8 places - 📳 **Haptic feedback** — adjustable intensity (light/medium/strong) - ⌨️ **Keyboard support** — full keyboard input - ♿ **Accessibility** — ARIA roles, semantic HTML, screen-reader labels - 📲 **PWA installable** — add to home screen, runs offline --- ## ⚠️ Known issues in v0.0.9 We're being transparent about what's broken. Here's the current state: ### 1. 🚨 Live preview deployment returning HTTP 500 **Status:** Under active investigation The live preview at **openclac.space-z.ai** is currently returning a 500 error ("Sorry, there was a problem deploying the code"). **Root cause identified:** - The deployment platform's build script requires `db/custom.db` to exist in the repo. We had previously gitignored it, causing the build to fail with `exit 1`. - We also had an eager `PrismaClient` instantiation in `src/lib/db.ts` that crashed when `DATABASE_URL` wasn't available at build time. **Fixes pushed to `main`:** - ✅ Tracked `db/custom.db` in git (commit `5728617`) - ✅ Rewrote `db.ts` to lazy-load Prisma (commit `b49080b`) - ✅ Added `postinstall: prisma generate` to `package.json` - ✅ Verified local production build succeeds - ✅ Verified local production server returns 200 OK **What's still needed:** - The Z.ai deployment platform needs to rebuild from the latest `main`. This may require a manual redeploy trigger from the platform UI, or it may resolve itself once the platform picks up the latest commits. - If you're a Z.ai team member, please trigger a redeploy of the `openclac.space-z.ai` site. ### 2. 🔐 Authentication not yet implemented User authentication (Email, Google, Anonymous Guest) is on the roadmap for **v1.1**. The current v0.0.9 stores all data locally on the device. There is no cloud sync yet. ### 3. 📱 No APK yet The Android APK is the headline feature of **v1.0.0** (tomorrow). v0.0.9 is web-only. To test on mobile today, install it as a PWA: 1. Open the live preview (once it's back up) or run locally 2. In Chrome mobile, tap menu → "Install app" 3. OpenCalc appears in your app drawer ### 4. 🧪 Limited test coverage Unit, widget, and integration tests are not yet written. We're relying on manual testing for v0.0.9. If you find a bug, please [open an issue](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/issues) with reproduction steps. ### 5. 🌐 No internationalization The UI is English-only for now. i18n is on the roadmap. --- ## 🗺️ What's coming in v1.0.0 (July 1, 2026) Tomorrow's stable release adds the headline feature: **the first installable Android APK**. ### New in v1.0.0 - 📱 **Signed Android APK** — installable on any Android 8+ device - 🏷️ **Proper version tagging** — semantic versioning from here on - 📋 **Release notes** — auto-generated from commits - 🤖 **GitHub Actions** — automated APK build pipeline (`.github/workflows/release.yml`) - 📸 **Screenshots** — in-app screenshots for the README and release page - 📦 **APK checksums** — SHA256 for integrity verification ### How v1.0.0 will be released 1. We tag `v1.0.0` on `main` 2. The release workflow builds the APK (via Capacitor or TWA wrapper) 3. The APK is attached to the GitHub Release at **https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/releases** 4. Users download `OpenCalc-v1.0.0.apk`, enable "Install from unknown sources" on Android, and install ### Why we're waiting until July 1 We want v1.0.0 to be the first *stable* release. Today (June 30) we're shipping v0.0.9 as a testing version so contributors and early users can: - Run the code locally - Find and report bugs - Suggest last-minute improvements - Star the repo ⭐ Tomorrow's v1.0.0 will incorporate any fixes from today's testing. --- ## 🤝 How you can help We **need your help** to make v1.0.0 great. Here's how: ### 1. 🐛 Test and report bugs Download the ZIP, run it locally, and try to break it. When you find a bug: 1. [Open a new issue](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) 2. Fill in the bug report template (reproduction steps, environment, screenshots) 3. We'll triage it before v1.0.0 ### 2. 💡 Suggest features Have an idea? [Open a feature request](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/issues/new?template=feature_request.md). ### 3. 🔧 Submit fixes Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md), fork the repo, and open a PR. We welcome: - Bug fixes - Design polish - Accessibility improvements - Tests - Translations (once i18n lands) ### 4. ⭐ Star the repo Stars help with discoverability. If you like OpenCalc, [star it](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/stargazers)! ### 5. 📣 Spread the word Share OpenCalc with anyone who needs a clean, open-source calculator. --- ## 🛠️ Tech stack | Layer | Technology | |-------|-----------| | Framework | Next.js 16 (App Router) | | Language | TypeScript 5 | | UI | shadcn/ui + custom Material 3 keys | | Styling | Tailwind CSS 4 + custom OKLCH tokens | | Animation | Framer Motion 12 | | State | Zustand 5 (persisted) | | Math | mathjs | | LaTeX | KaTeX | | Database | Prisma + SQLite (local) | | Auth | TBD — Supabase planned for v1.1 | --- ## 📄 License MIT — see [LICENSE](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/blob/main/LICENSE). --- ## 🙏 Acknowledgements - [mathjs](https://mathjs.org) — the math engine - [KaTeX](https://katex.org) — LaTeX rendering - [Next.js](https://nextjs.org) — the framework - [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com) — UI components - [Framer Motion](https://www.framer.com/motion/) — animations - [Material Design 3](https://m3.material.io) — design inspiration - Every contributor and tester ❤️ ---
**⏰ v1.0.0 drops tomorrow — July 1, 2026 ⏰** [⭐ Star the repo](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/stargazers) · [🐛 Report a bug](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) · [💡 Suggest a feature](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) · [📖 Read the docs](https://github.com/huzaifaa-dev-vibe/Open-Calc#readme)
